description: Style Noteallen solly was formed in 1744 in Nottingham, England. Their handbags are creatively engineered to cater to the woman of today. Make a style statement effortlessly with this simply silhouetted leatherette handbag. With short handles, legs at the base and classy stitch detailing, this bag in white makes a fabulous combination of style and practicality.Product DetailsHas one roomy zipped compartment, with organiser sleeves, an inner zipped compartmentOne small zipped pocket on the front for enhanced spaceTwo short handles for carrying ease and styleBuckle design on the front, back and sides and brand name embossed on a small placard looped through the metallic loop on the handleLegs at the base for stabilityMaterial and CareLeatheretteWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dustSizeHeight: 31 cmWidth: 34 cmDepth: 14 cm
